title: Chronicle Books for Cooks
author: Robin Asbell, Susie Middleton, Karen Morgan, Joseph Shuldiner, Melissa's / World Variety Produce, Inc.
description: Thinking about going gluten-free, giving the vegan diet a try, or eating more vegetables, fruit, and whole grains in 2014? Chronicle Books has the recipes and inspiration you need to keep your new year's resolutions! Get started cooking healthier now with 15 recipes from 5 great cookbooks—a mini-cookbook to kick off a tasty new year!
